TEXT:
In the observatory ruins, a clockwork map kept redrawing the sky as if tomorrow had already happened and was trying to warn us. A few seconds later they stopped reading it; an hour after this time there is still no sign that any more will occur on Wednesday with little apparent effect or significance except for possibly keeping you awake until 8 am at night . The final message from their last room's window reads something like "Have your child come upstairs!"
